name: grafana-mcp
description: Local Grafana MCP bridge for this trading bot workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Local MCP bridge for repo Grafana
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to the repo's Dockerized Grafana stack through the official grafana/mcp-grafana server so dashboard inspection and targeted edits do not require manual API choreography.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the local Grafana dashboards for this trading bot
Check datasource health and dashboard variables in Grafana
Review config tuning panels through Grafana MCP
